widgets_values:
Professional fashion lookbook video generated from the reference image.

The model remains completely still in the same pose as the reference image.
The body posture and gaze direction never change. Only the camera positions change.

The exact same outfit must remain identical in every shot.
No garment redesign and no color changes.

The video lasts 5 seconds total with hard cuts between shots.
Each shot uses a different STATIC camera placed around the model.
Cameras do not move. No zoom. No push-in. No orbit.

Shot 1 (0-1s): Frontal full-body hero shot. Face visible.
Shot 2 (1-2s): Camera at chest height on top garment. Face cropped out.
Shot 3 (2-3s): Low camera near floor on trousers. Face not visible.
Shot 4 (3-4s): Rear-side camera at 120 degrees. Face not visible.
Shot 5 (4-5s): High camera looking down at torso. Face cropped out.

LIGHTING: Clean editorial studio, identical across all shots.
No face visible after shot 1. No artifacts. No flicker.
nodes.title: 🎬 LTX-2.3 Imagen a Video

widgets_values:
🎬 LOOKS Video Lookbook — LTX-2.3

Nodo all-in-one: LTXVImgToVideo
Si ese nodo no existe, usa: LTXV Imagen a Video

Si pide modelo base, necesitamos descargar el LTX-2 base model.
El archivo actual (ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384) es un LoRA.

⚙️ Settings: 121 frames, 25fps (~5s), 768x1344, 8 steps
📝 Prompt: 5 shots con zooms en prendas, sin cara después del shot 1

Si LTXVImgToVideo no funciona, prueba:
  video > LTXV > LTXV Imagen a Video (nodo all-in-one)
